raw_text: jorge gonzález gómez marqués de san juan 25, valencia 46015, spain +34646055336, jorgongem@metsid.upv.es education university of maryland, a. james clark school of engineering maryland, united states aerospace engineering may 2015 gpa: 4.0 universidad politéctica de valencia valencia, spain aeronautical engineering may 2014 gpa: 3.0 university of rzeszów rzeszow, poland aerospace engineering may 2012 gpa: 3.3 experience elective research (pfc) umd, college park, usa 1/2015 - 5/2015 + study of flow turbulences around buildings and roofs. + construction of a model to test using oil technique as a flow visualization in the wind tunnel. + results compared using computational fuild dynamics software (cfd). space shuttle project upv, valencia team member oct. 2013 jan 2014 + worked with a student to test the aerodynamic effects using cfd in a model of the space shuttle. + used a mesh of four million elements with ansys software. + calculated cp, cl, pressure, velocity and temperature fields, shock waves and turbulent regions. helicopter turbine project upv, valencia team member feb. 2014 june 2014 + collaborated with a team of 4 students to design a two spool turbine to give power to the compressor and the main rotor of an helicopter. + improved the design to obtain maximum efficiency and low torsion in rotor blades. turbojet engine project upv, valencia team member nov. 2013 - jan 2014 + analized with another student a not ideal cycle of turbojet engine with bleed control in different actuations and variations in its operating line. + compared the differences using gsp and gasturb software. currículo: jorge gonzález gómez lectures upv, valencia 2014-2015 + gave a lecture about the effects of hidrogen embrittlement in aeronautical steels and its prevention to senior students. + introduction to cooling systems in rockets including regenerative, ablative and film cooling to senior students. skills proficient in: microsoft word, excel, powerpoint matlab, gsp, autodesk inventor, mathematica, windows and mac os x. exposure to: c++, gasturb. languages: english, spanish and basic polish. work experience private tutor oct. 2009 - present worked as a private tutor with high school students teaching mathematics, physics, quemistry, biology and technology.
